title: The Gilded Highway
writer: William Babington Maxwell, Marian Constance Blackton
actors: Dorothy Devore, John Harron, Macklyn Arbuckle
plot: The Welby's inherit a fortune from an uncle they barely and carelessly cared for during his last years. The money turns all the family into social-climbing snobs to the point of ignoring old friends and breaking off marriage engag...
